title: Conduct equipment experting for machine shearing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct equipment experting for machine shearing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Trim and finish combs

pcs.text: Identify signs of non-optimal equipment performance and remedy1.2 Identify potential and existing work health and safety hazards and implement control measures1.3 Confirm that the trim and finish meet the requirements of the current shearing task1.4 Maintain control of comb and tools throughout the experting process1.5 Adapt the comb in a form that meets individual shearing style
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify signs of non-optimal equipment performance and remedy1.2 Identify potential and existing work health and safety hazards and implement control measures1.3 Confirm that the trim and finish meet the requirements of the current shearing task1.4 Maintain control of comb and tools throughout the experting process1.5 Adapt the comb in a form that meets individual shearing style?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify signs of non-optimal equipment performance and remedy1.2 Identify potential and existing work health and safety hazards and implement control measures1.3 Confirm that the trim and finish meet the requirements of the current shearing task1.4 Maintain control of comb and tools throughout the experting process1.5 Adapt the comb in a form that meets individual shearing style.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Trim and finish combs

elements.title: Scallop comb

pcs.text: Recognise and apply the principles and method of scalloping2.2 Determine the interrelationship between correctly scalloped combs and shearing performance in terms of density of wool, time of year, and breed2.3 Scallop combs to meet the shearing style of individual shearers
